findings.issue: Spurious (PPM) suffix in category names inside definition
findings.detail: zh definition embeds '（PPM）' into category names: 「明星产品（PPM）」「问题儿（PPM）」 etc. JP/EN do not have this. Possible MT artifact or incorrect disambiguation tag.

findings.issue: PPM label: IT Passport uses 'Product Portfolio Management' (not BCG Matrix)
findings.detail: Standard in JP IT Passport context. No correction needed.
zh figure caption has '（PPM）': '培育现金牛（PPM）　所有生产出的商品或服务在发布后立即爆发性热销的情况极为罕见。企业为了销售商品会不断进行投资加以培育。'. JP caption does not have this suffix.

findings.issue: Spurious (PPM) suffix in table cell — axis description
findings.detail: zh cell: '自家产品在市场中的占有率（份额）。占有率越高，越能以有利的方式开展业务。在PPM图中，市场占有率较高的左侧分布着「明星产品（PPM）」和「现金牛（PPM）」' embeds (PPM) in category names

findings.issue: Problem Child definition is minimal — no strategy mentioned
findings.detail: Definition covers quadrant placement only. Strategy discussion may be on adjacent page or intentionally abbreviated.

findings.issue: Spurious (PPM) suffix in zh surface term
findings.detail: zh surface: '现金牛（PPM）'. JP='金のなる木', EN='Cash Cow' — no acronym suffix.

findings.issue: Spurious (PPM) suffix in zh surface term for Dog
findings.detail: zh surface: '瘦狗（PPM）'. JP='負け犬', EN='Dog'.

findings.issue: Spurious (PPM) tag inside Dog definition body
findings.detail: '瘦狗（PPM）' appears in zh definition. JP does not have this.

findings.issue: Mixed punctuation: half-width comma in zh definition
findings.detail: Found '企业,' — should use full-width '，' for CJK text consistency. Also 'R&D' should remain R&D in zh (acceptable).

findings.issue: ノウハウ translated as '专有知识' in zh
findings.detail: Acceptable — '专有知识' (proprietary knowledge) or '技术诀窍' (know-how) both valid. No correction needed.

findings.issue: ベンチャー企業 translated as 'startup company' — slight divergence
findings.detail: JP '新興企業' means 'emerging company' broadly; EN 'startup' implies early-stage only. Consider 'emerging/venture company' for precision.

findings.issue: Inconsistent zh for '株式': term def uses '股份', table uses '股票'
findings.detail: Term def: '企业之间相互持有对方股份，以加强合作关系'; Table: '企业之间相互持有对方股票，以加强合作关系'
